subtopics: Linear Regression: assumptions, OLS, gradient descent
Logistic Regression: sigmoid, log-loss, regularization
Decision Trees: Gini impurity, entropy, information gain, pruning
Random Forests: bagging, feature importance, OOB error
Gradient Boosting: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost
Support Vector Machines: kernel trick, margin, soft-margin
K-Nearest Neighbors: distance metrics, curse of dimensionality
Naive Bayes: Gaussian, Multinomial, Bernoulli variants
K-Means Clustering: initialization (k-means++), elbow method
Hierarchical Clustering: agglomerative, divisive, dendrograms
DBSCAN: density-based, core points, noise
PCA: eigendecomposition, explained variance, scree plot
t-SNE: non-linear dimensionality reduction, perplexity
Autoencoders: encoder-decoder, bottleneck, anomaly detection
Gaussian Mixture Models: EM algorithm, soft assignments
Neural Networks: forward pass, backpropagation, chain rule
Activation functions: ReLU, sigmoid, tanh, GELU, Swish
Optimizers: SGD, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, learning rate scheduling
Regularization: L1/L2, dropout, batch normalization, layer normalization
CNNs: convolution, pooling, receptive field, ResNet, EfficientNet
RNNs: vanishing gradient, LSTM, GRU
Attention mechanism: self-attention, multi-head attention
Loss functions: cross-entropy, MSE, focal loss, contrastive loss
Transformer architecture: encoder, decoder, encoder-decoder
BERT: masked language modelling, next sentence prediction, fine-tuning
GPT series: autoregressive LM, in-context learning, few-shot
Positional encoding: sinusoidal, rotary (RoPE), ALiBi
Tokenization: BPE, WordPiece, SentencePiece
Fine-tuning: full fine-tune, LoRA, QLoRA, adapter layers
RLHF: reward model, PPO, DPO
RAG: retrieval-augmented generation, vector stores, chunking
Prompt engineering: zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought
ML Pipelines: orchestration with Airflow, Kubeflow, Prefect
Experiment tracking: MLflow, Weights & Biases, DVC
Model serving: REST APIs (FastAPI, Flask), gRPC, TorchServe
Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes for ML workloads
CI/CD for ML: GitHub Actions, automated testing, model validation
Feature stores: Feast, Tecton, offline vs online features
Model monitoring: data drift, concept drift, performance degradation
A/B testing and shadow deployment
Handling missing values: imputation strategies, MCAR/MAR/MNAR
Categorical encoding: one-hot, label, target, ordinal encoding
Numerical transformations: log, Box-Cox, standardization, normalization
Feature selection: filter, wrapper, embedded methods
Interaction features and polynomial features
Time series features: lag features, rolling statistics, seasonality
Text features: TF-IDF, word embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe, FastText)
Image preprocessing: resizing, normalization, augmentation
Classification metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, PR-AUC
Regression metrics: MAE, MSE, RMSE, R², MAPE
Cross-validation: k-fold, stratified k-fold, time-series split
Bias-variance tradeoff: underfitting, overfitting, regularization
Confusion matrix and its derived metrics
Calibration: Platt scaling, isotonic regression
Statistical tests: t-test, chi-square, ANOVA for model comparison
Fairness metrics: demographic parity, equalized odds
Probability basics: joint, conditional, marginal probability
Bayes theorem and Bayesian inference
Common distributions: Normal, Bernoulli, Binomial, Poisson, Exponential
Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) and MAP estimation
Central Limit Theorem and Law of Large Numbers
Hypothesis testing: p-values, Type I/II errors, power
Information theory: entropy, KL divergence, mutual information
Expectation, variance, covariance, correlation
